nasb.text: So the king said, “Whoever speaks to you, bring him to me, and he will not touch you anymore.”

esv.text: The king said, “If anyone says anything to you, bring him to me, and he shall never touch you again.”

cnv.text: 王說：“對你說這事的，你就把他帶到我這裡來，他必不會再打擾你了。”

ccb.text: 王说：“若有人为难你，你就把他带来，他必不敢再找你的麻烦。”
